NCT04896008.label: Outcome
NCT04896008.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT04896008.text: RESULTS: A total of 172 patients were included (86 each in the sotatercept and placebo groups).

NCT05231954.label: Outcome
NCT05231954.text: Compared with the usual care clinics (12-month incidence, 213 of 1724 [12.4%]), the odds of an incident ADRD diagnosis were higher in the clinics randomized to QDRS plus PDM (12-month incidence, 355 of 2301 [15.4%]; adjusted odds ratio [AOR], 1.31; 95% CI, 1.05-1.64) but not the clinics randomized to PDM only (12-month incidence, 134 of 1300 [10.3%]; AOR, 0.84; 95% CI, 0.63-1.11]).

NCT04456998.label: Outcome
NCT04456998.text: The most common treatment-emergent adverse event in both treatment groups was cough: 16 (38%) of 42 patients in the placebo group; 19 (43%) of 44 patients in the seralutinib group.

NCT01794624.label: Outcome
NCT01794624.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT01794624.text: RESULTS: A total of 250 patients were randomly assigned to placebo, 250 to the 3-mg macitentan dose, and 242 to the 10-mg macitentan dose.
